title: AI is shifting from tool to teammate
author: Zain Kahn January
text:
- Superhuman AI
- Posts
- AI is shifting from tool to teammate
AI is shifting from tool to teammate
ALSO: How to create a report from survey data with Claude
Welcome back, Superhuman. 2026 will likely be the year AI stops being a tool and starts becoming a coworker. Case in point: A new project called Clawdbot is going viral as a "personal AI assistant," Claude Code now lets you hand off entire projects, and Claude in Excel went live for Pro plans. Let's get into it.
Today: Claude for Excel goes live, how to create a report from survey data with Claude, and get the latest prompts and trending social posts.
TODAY IN AI
1. Anthropic launches Claude in Excel and new “Tasks” system for Claude Code: Claude in Excel is now available for Pro subscribers, letting users ask questions about any cell, test scenarios without breaking formulas, and debug errors — all with cell-level citations to verify logic. Watch it in action here. Claude Code also replaced its old Todos system with “Tasks,” an infrastructure that lets Claude handle complex, multi-step projects more efficiently. Learn more here.
2. Leading AI researcher in talks to raise at $4B valuation for self-improving superintelligent AI: Richard Socher — one of the world’s most decorated AI researchers — is reportedly in talks to raise hundreds of millions for a new AI lab called Recursive, which aims to build self-improving superintelligent AI systems. Socher has serious credibility: a Stanford PhD, 180,000+ academic citations, and a track record that includes founding MetaMind (acquired by Salesforce in 2016) and You. com (now valued at $1.5B with $200M+ raised).
3. Vibe coding startup Anything is looking to hire “vibe coders”: The founder of Anything posted to X that he's looking to hire vibe coders, or non-technical people who use AI chatbots to generate working code from simple descriptions. The startup is growing quickly — hitting $2M in annual recurring revenue and a $100M valuation just two weeks after launching. Interested? Just reply to his post for more details.
PRESENTED BY AUTHO
Not long ago, maximizing an agent’s power meant sacrificing security (and your trust).
But with Auth0 for AI Agents, you can build enterprise-grade agents with complete control and the innovation you need:
Connect your AI agents to apps and data more securely
Give users control over the AI agents' actions and data access
Enable human confirmation for critical agent actions
AI leaders: This is the complete auth solution you’ve been looking for.
FROM THE FRONTIER
Clawdbot: Meet the viral AI assistant that you can text 24/7 to handle tasks
Made with Midjourney
Clawdbot’s viral moment. A space-lobster-themed AI assistant has been going mega-viral, but don’t let the wacky branding fool you. Users have said this powerful tool is “like having superpowers,“ “better than anything ChatGPT will ever release,” and “1,000% worth it.” So what exactly is it?
Personal AI you can text. Clawdbot is an AI agent that runs 24/7 — browsing the web, sending emails, or completing tasks on your behalf. It connects to all the popular messaging apps, meaning you can text it instructions from anywhere. But the real game-changer is its memory: Clawdbot remembers your preferences and proactively reaches out when something needs your attention.
Clawdbot in action. Early adopters are using Clawdbot to send personalized morning briefings pulled from their email and calendar, create automated reminders and follow-ups, and outsource mundane tasks. The tool is just a few weeks old, and people are still exploring what Clawdbot can really do.
Getting started (at your own risk). Clawdbot is a new, open-source project — not a polished consumer product. Connecting Clawdbot to your tools and letting it handle tasks comes with risks: hallucinations, misinterpretations, and prompt injection attacks. If you’re comfortable with that, you can learn more at clawd.bot (here’s a quick guide to help you get started).
THE AI ACADEMY
How to create a report from survey data with Claude
Go to Claude and sign up.
Enter your prompt, upload your survey data, and press Enter.
Sample Prompt: I collected hundreds of campus sustainability survey responses. Help me transform the CSV file into executive-ready materials for stakeholder review. Create: Excel workbook with formatted analysis tables, Word report with data-driven narrative, PowerPoint deck with boardroom-quality visuals
Claude reads complex datasets and produces multiple coordinated outputs for you.
Each file maintains professional formatting and opens directly in Office or Google Workspace.
PRESENTED BY BEEHIIV
It doesn’t matter your career, interests, or background, with beehiiv Digital Products, you can make real money selling your expertise online—think 1:1 coaching, eBooks, templates, and more.
With a full suite of upgrades, allowing you to embed user reviews, create beautiful product pages, and accept international currencies, you can maximize your revenue with Digital Products on beehiiv.
IN THE KNOW
What’s trending on socials and headlines today
Meme of the day
🦞 Clawdbot in Action: Learn 10 wild ways people are using Clawdbot to boost productivity, build businesses, and make their lives easier.

🤯 Superintelligence is Coming: The co-founder of Google DeepMind just admitted that artificial general intelligence (AGI) is officially on the horizon.
📸 Instant Photo Editing: Krea AI just launched real-time editing for images, and the demo has racked up nearly 8 million views.
🏆️ AI Domination: One Redditor crushed ChatGPT at rock, paper, scissors — and the AI’s naive response is going viral (2.6K upvotes).
PRODUCTIVITY
5 New & Trending AI Tools
🧠 Scroll.ai*: Thousands of companies rely on Scroll to automate knowledge workflows across documentation, RFPs, agency work, and more.
🖼️ MovArt: Create viral videos and high-converting images with AI.
🗣️ Leadde: Transform your content into professional, multilingual and interactive videos in minutes.
📱 Fimo: Instantly generate your site, then collaborate with your team to keep it forever in motion.
➕ Datastripes: Turn your data into visual stories and podcasts in seconds.
* indicates a promoted tool, if any
PROMPT STATION
Find Your Hidden Differentiators
Prompt: Analyze my career history, roles, and experiences below:
[paste career history]
Ask me additional questions about my career history. Identify 3–5 hidden differentiators that set me apart from other candidates with similar titles or backgrounds. Look beyond obvious skills and focus on patterns, uncommon experiences, trade-offs I’ve made, or moments where I took responsibility, solved ambiguous problems, or created outsized impact.
For each differentiator:
Explain why it’s uncommon
Tie it to a specific story or moment I can reference in interviews
Suggest how to frame it so it sounds confident and credible, not boastful
Prioritize insights that would help me stand out in interviews, answer “Tell me about yourself” more memorably, and differentiate me from equally qualified candidates.
Product Photography
Source: hudie88
Midjourney Prompt: a bottle of light green liquid face serum with black dropper top sitting on an open white and lemon themed box, the brand name "Brand" is written in light gray letters at one side of it, a few slices of fresh lemons lie around the serums packaging, the background color should be soft pastel blue and beige, product photography, high resolution, aesthetic --ar 85:128

Until next time — Zain, Theodore, & the Superhuman AI team
